PAYMENT_HANDLES.TITLE: Payment Handles
PAYMENT_HANDLES.DESCRIPTION: Configure payment tags per platform, priority order for rotation, and failover tracking.
PAYMENT_HANDLES.EMPTY: No payment handles yet. Add one to get started.
PAYMENT_HANDLES.SEARCH_PLACEHOLDER: Search by handle, display name, or platform…

MODAL.ADD_DESC: Create a handle for a platform. Handles are normalized by stripping a leading dollar sign or at-symbol from the handle, then lowercased.
MODAL.EDIT_DESC: Update this handle. Leave the email password blank to keep the current password.

FORM.HANDLE_PLACEHOLDER: Enter cashtag or username (e.g. sofiamann8, DEVPATEL742, nadia-khan-7)
FORM.DISPLAY_NAME_PLACEHOLDER: Enter the person's name (e.g. Sofia Mann)
FORM.PASSWORD_PLACEHOLDER: Leave blank to keep current password

DELETE_CONFIRM.TITLE: Delete payment handle
DELETE_CONFIRM.MESSAGE: Are you sure you want to delete this handle?
